title: Ctrl + Alt + Hack 2025 - NSUT
description: Presented the Murphy Sustum project and achieved a 1st position among 250+ teams at this prestigious hackathon in Delhi NSUT.

title: Code Wizard 2025
description: Presented the Brain Wizard project and achieved top 10th position among 400+ teams at this prestigious hackathon in Dehli SRM college.

title: INNOV8
description: Presented the G.U.A.R.D. project and achieved a top 5 finalist position among 700+ teams at this prestigious hackathon in Jaipur.

title: Smart Tech
description: Developed pioneering solutions in data science and machine learning, earning accolades for innovation and impact.

title: VIHAN 007
description: Won the 'Best IEEE Award' in North India's biggest hackathon for the Global Unified Accident Response Device (G.U.A.R.D.) project.

title: HIS 2.0
description: Secured the 5th rank in Rajasthan's largest hackathon for the innovative RoboCop highway safety project.

title: Think'IN Green
description: Won the Think'N Green Hackathon for the Mycofibre project, which focused on sustainable materials and environmental innovation.

title: Bihar Innovation Challenge 2024
description: Selected among the top 25 teams for presenting Mycofibre, a project revolutionizing sustainable material development.

title: VIHAAN 6.0
description: Awarded the 'Best Freshers Award' for outstanding performance and innovation with the Mycofibre project in a major hackathon.

title: CU Sharks
description: Secured 1st Prize among 500 teams at this pitching competition where investors evaluated projects, resulting in a funding of 8 Lakhs.

title: CAB'25 Meeting
description: A showcase event where VPs and dignitaries from various companies review student projects. CAB’25 was an incredible opportunity to demonstrate how AI and space exploration solve real-world challenges, offering valuable insights into the future of AI in planetary research.

title: Academic Excellence Award
description: Recognition of outstanding Academic Excellence, unwavering dedication, and remarkable achievement during the academic year 2024-2025.
